title: Lesson 320: 投げる, 為さる, 成るべく...

items.gloss: to throw; to hurl; to fling; to toss; to cast; to give up; to abandon; to throw away; to cast (a glance, shadow, doubt, etc.)
as (much) as possible; as (much) as one can; wherever practicable; if possible
to get used to; to grow accustomed to; to become familiar with; to become skilled in; to become experienced at; to become tame; to become domesticated; to get used to doing
odour; odor; scent; smell; stench; aura; whiff; smacks of ...; sense; flavour; flavor
